expectations.text: Claude reads pyproject.toml and source files before asking any question
expectations.evidence: Lists specific details from pyproject.toml (ruff config, line length) and source files (Invoice model fields, routes)

expectations.text: Claude presents a KNOWN list of 3-5 things it inferred from the codebase
expectations.evidence: 7 bullet points covering stack, name, architecture, data model, testing, code style, AGENTS.md status

expectations.text: Claude correctly identifies FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL, pytest, and ruff
expectations.evidence: First bullet: 'Python 3.11+, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2.0, Pydantic v2, Alembic, PostgreSQL'

expectations.text: First question is about the product/what the project does
expectations.evidence: First question: 'What does this API do, and who uses it?'

expectations.text: Questions include concrete options and a recommendation
expectations.evidence: 3 options (A: Internal tool, B: Client-facing, C: Part of larger system) with recommendation for A

expectations.text: Claude asks exactly one question per message, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Single question with options, no follow-ups packed in
